questions.q: In April 2026, what action did a judge take regarding Arizona's regulation of prediction market operators like Kalshi?
options: Barred Arizona from regulating them and paused prosecution of Kalshi
Upheld Arizona's right to regulate and ordered Kalshi's immediate prosecution
Mandated federal oversight for all prediction market operators in Arizona
Required Kalshi to cease all operations in Arizona permanently
questions.correctText: Barred Arizona from regulating them and paused prosecution of Kalshi

questions.q: A study analyzing the global wildlife trade found that traded mammals are how much more likely to share pathogens with humans than non-traded mammals?
questions.correctText: Traded mammals are 1.5 times more likely to share pathogens with humans than non-traded species.

questions.q: What are the key components of expanding revenue streams for a golf center, according to the Reddit post?
options: Driving Range, Pro Shop, and Restaurant

questions.q: What specific Windows 11 updates have been confirmed to cause issues with the 'Reset this PC' function on certain systems?
Japan has approved an additional $4 billion to accelerate research and development at which chipmaker?
What action did a federal judge take regarding the $6.2 billion merger of local TV giants Nexstar and Tegna in April 2026?
options: Extended a restraining order on the merger
Approved the merger to proceed immediately
Requested a renegotiation of the merger terms
questions.correctText: Extended a restraining order on the merger

questions.q: In which European country did a majority of citizens express belief that the April 12 election would be rigged or manipulated?
Which country recently deployed 13,000 troops and fighter jets to Saudi Arabia?
New research suggests that regulatory T cells (Tregs), which act as immune system 'brakes,' are often altered in children with what condition?
questions.correctText: Regulatory T cells are altered in children with autism, potentially playing a role in neuroinflammation and behavior.

questions.q: According to Carney, which country announced its intention to end the '70 Cents to US' defence spending model?
